description.ko: 바다에서 가장 신비로운 심해에 잠겨 있는 최첨단 연구 시설로, 생물 발광 생명체들이 심연의 영원한 어둠을 밝히는 풍경을 담고 있습니다.
description.en: A high-tech research facility submerged in the most mysterious depths of the ocean, where bioluminescent life forms illuminate the eternal darkness of the abyss.

prompt: Cinematic shot of a futuristic underwater research station named AQUA-5, located in the dark abyssal zone of the deep ocean, featuring neon blue bioluminescent accents, surrounded by glowing deep-sea jellyfish and ancient hydrothermal vents, ultra-realistic, 8k resolution, volumetric lighting, deep navy and cyan color palette
